function.name: _query_table_field_designer
function.description:
Query detailed configuration information of a field in the specified data table. Can obtain all information of the data table field.

Parameter description:
- tableId: Data table ID. This value comes from the id field in the return result of calling the _query_table_list_designer interface, **forbidden to fabricate by yourself**.
- fieldId: Field ID. This value comes from the field id in the fieldList of the return result of calling the _query_table_define_designer interface.

Return description:
- Returns the complete configuration information of the specified data table field.
